name: Homelab Dashboard
subtitle: Monitor and manage your homelab
description: A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem. Built with Swift 6 and SwiftUI, featuring the Liquid Glass design system.

apps.name: Homelab
apps.subtitle: Your homelab, in your pocket.
apps.localizedDescription:
A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem.

Integrated services:
• Portainer — Monitor Docker containers, CPU/Memory usage, Start/Stop/Restart
• Pi-hole — Real-time query stats, blocked domains, toggle ad-blocking
• Beszel — System monitor with CPU, Memory, Disk usage across nodes
• Gitea — Browse repos, contribution heatmaps, syntax-highlighted code
• Nginx Proxy Manager — Proxy hosts, redirections, SSL certificates
• Tailscale — VPN connectivity status and quick launch
• AdGuard Home — DNS query stats, filters, blocked services, rewrites
• Healthcheck — Monitor uptime, response times, notifications
• Patchmon — Track software updates and patches across your infrastructure
• Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage and playback stats
• Bookmarks — Save and organize your homelab links

Features:
• Multi-instance support for all services
• Cyberpunk visual mode for service cards
• Multilingual: English, Italian, French, Spanish, German
• Liquid Glass UI design
• Face ID / biometric unlock

versions.localizedDescription:
## What's New in v0.8.2

- **NPMplus Support**: Added compatibility with the NPMplus fork of Nginx Proxy Manager (cookie-based token fallback)
- **Configured Services Page**: New dedicated page in Settings to view, add, edit, delete, and reorder all your configured services
- **Update Popup**: Full-screen popup notification on app launch when a new version is available, with changelog display
- **Settings Reorder**: Reorganized settings layout for better usability — donation card on top, cleaner card styles
- **Bug Fixes**: Fixed JPEG-as-PNG resource issue on Android, improved build stability

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI / Liquid Glass) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose / Material 3) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New

- **NPMplus Support**: Added cookie-based token fallback for NPMplus (Nginx Proxy Manager fork with CrowdSec)
- **Configured Services Page**: New dedicated page in Settings to manage all connected services
- **Update Popup**: Full-screen popup notification on app launch when a new version is available
- **Settings Redesigned**: Reordered sections, neutral card style for Debug and Services

## Fixes
- Fixed `ic_splash_welcome.png` resource (was JPEG with .png extension)
- Version bumped to 0.8.2 (build 12) on both platforms

## What's New

- **Multi-GPU support in Beszel**: Systems with multiple GPUs now display all GPUs as separate cards with individual metrics and history charts (thanks @FlintyLemming!)
- Fix Android build issues (PNG format, missing ProGuard rules)

## Downloads
- **Homelab.ipa** — iOS (sideload via SideStore/AltStore)
- **Homelab.apk** — Android

## What's New in v0.8.0

### New Service: Plex
- Monitor your Plex Media Server from your phone
- View libraries, total items (Movies, Shows, Episodes, Music)
- Active sessions with real-time playback info (resolution, bitrate, user)
- Recently added media overview
- Server info with version and platform details

### Other
- Vibe-coding disclaimer added to README
- Star history chart restored
- Updated to 12 integrated services

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.2...v0.8.0

## What's New in v0.7.2

### New Feature
- **In-app update banner**: the app now checks for new versions and shows a notification in Settings when an update is available

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed cyberpunk mode color inconsistencies
- Fixed button alignment issues across multiple views

### Other
- Added `app-version.json` manifest for remote version checking
- Updated all translations (EN, IT, FR, ES, DE)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

## What's New in v0.7.1

### Bug Fix
- **Nginx Proxy Manager**: Fixed token expiration issue — the authentication token now refreshes automatically in the background, preventing failed requests.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1

What's New in v0.7.0:

- New Service: Patchmon — Track software updates and patches
- New Service: Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage
- Cyberpunk mode — unique visual theme for service cards
- Android UI redesign for multiple services
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

## What's New in v0.6.0

### New Service: Healthcheck
- Monitor uptime and health of your services
- View check statuses, response times, and notifications
- Create/edit checks with full configuration

### Improvements
- Redesigned README with table of contents and collapsible screenshot galleries
- Fixed SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE to persist across project regeneration
- Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

What's New in v0.5.0:

• New Service: AdGuard Home DNS
• Dashboard with real-time query statistics
• Query log, filters, blocked services, rewrites, user rules
• New ServiceIcon component
• Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

What's New in v0.4.0:

• Redesigned dashboard UI for all services
• New Beszel containers view and system detail
• Line graph visualizations
• Debug logging and improved error handling
• Multi-language support updates
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Homelab uses Face ID to quickly unlock the app.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Homelab needs to access your local network to communicate with your self-hosted services.
